title: Join features at the label's point in time
description: Construct training rows with a point-in-time join so each feature reflects only data available before the label timestamp.
body: Use when assembling a training set from time-varying features and labels. Do not join the latest feature value to a historical label — that injects future information and inflates offline metrics (temporal leakage). Actions: perform an as-of join keyed on entity and event time, taking the most recent feature value strictly before the label timestamp; verify no feature row postdates its label. Validation signals include a join audit showing every feature timestamp precedes its label and an offline metric that survives a temporal holdout. Risk boundary: temporal leakage is invisible until production underperforms; if a backfill cannot prove point-in-time correctness, escalate and rebuild the training set.
